---
jupyter: maker_bootcamp_venv
format:
  revealjs:
    include-in-header:
      - text: |
          <style>
          .py-editor {
            width: 100%;
            min-height: 240px;
            resize: vertical;
            font-family: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, "Liberation Mono", "Courier New", monospace;
            font-size: 18px;
            line-height: 1.35;
            border: 1px solid var(--color-border);
            border-radius: var(--radius-md);
            padding: 10px;
            box-sizing: border-box;
            background: #ffffff;
            color: #222222;
          }

          .py-run {
            margin-top: 10px;
            padding: 9px 14px;
            border: 0;
            border-radius: var(--radius-md);
            background: var(--color-teal);
            color: #ffffff;
            font-size: 16px;
            font-weight: 700;
            cursor: pointer;
          }

          .py-run:disabled {
            opacity: 0.6;
            cursor: progress;
          }

          .py-output {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 16px 18px;
            width: 100%;
            min-height: 330px;
            box-sizing: border-box;
            background: var(--color-code-bg);
            color: #e2e8f0;
            border-radius: var(--radius-md);
            border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08);
            box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15);
            overflow: auto;
            white-space: pre-wrap;
            overflow-wrap: anywhere;
            font-family: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, "Liberation Mono", "Courier New", monospace;
            font-size: 18px;
            line-height: 1.35;
          }
          </style>
          <script type="module">
          import { loadPyodide } from "https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/pyodide/v0.27.2/full/pyodide.mjs";

          let pyodidePromise = null;

          async function getPyodide() {
            if (!pyodidePromise) {
              pyodidePromise = loadPyodide();
            }
            return pyodidePromise;
          }

          async function runPython(codeId, outputId, button) {
            const codeEl = document.getElementById(codeId);
            const outEl = document.getElementById(outputId);
            if (!codeEl || !outEl) return;

            const originalLabel = button ? button.textContent : "";
            if (button) {
              button.disabled = true;
              button.textContent = "Running...";
            }

            outEl.textContent = "Running...";

            try {
              const pyodide = await getPyodide();
              let output = "";

              pyodide.setStdout({
                batched: (msg) => {
                  output += (output ? "\\n" : "") + msg;
                },
              });

              pyodide.setStderr({
                batched: (msg) => {
                  output += (output ? "\\n" : "") + msg;
                },
              });

              const result = await pyodide.runPythonAsync(codeEl.value);
              if (result !== undefined && result !== null) {
                output += (output ? "\\n" : "") + String(result);
              }

              outEl.textContent = output || "(no output)";
            } catch (err) {
              outEl.textContent = "Error:\\n" + String(err);
            } finally {
              if (button) {
                button.disabled = false;
                button.textContent = originalLabel;
              }
            }
          }

          document.addEventListener("click", (event) => {
            const btn = event.target.closest(".py-run");
            if (!btn) return;
            runPython(btn.dataset.codeId, btn.dataset.outputId, btn);
          });
          </script>
---

## 1.1 Hello World {.content}

```{=html}
<div class="top-bar">1. PYTHON BASICS</div>
<div class="screenshot-row">
  <div class="callout-box">
    <textarea id="code-hello" class="py-editor">print("Hello, world!")</textarea>
    <button class="py-run" data-code-id="code-hello" data-output-id="out-hello">Run Code</button>
    <p class="concept-insight"><strong>*</strong> Edit the code and click Run Code.</p>
  </div>
  <div class="main-panel">
    <pre id="out-hello" class="py-output">Output will appear here.</pre>
  </div>
</div>
```

## 1.2 Variables and Math {.content}

```{=html}
<div class="top-bar">1. PYTHON BASICS</div>
<div class="screenshot-row">
  <div class="callout-box">
    <textarea id="code-vars" class="py-editor">name = "Maker"
project_count = 3
print(f"Hi {name}! Projects done: {project_count}")
print("Next target:", project_count + 1)</textarea>
    <button class="py-run" data-code-id="code-vars" data-output-id="out-vars">Run Code</button>
    <p class="concept-insight"><strong>*</strong> Change values, then rerun.</p>
  </div>
  <div class="main-panel">
    <pre id="out-vars" class="py-output">Output will appear here.</pre>
  </div>
</div>
```
